agent_prompt:
Find official evidence URLs for this batch of 50 eBay programs.

**Programs to research (Batch 1):**

1. eBay (node_id: ebay)
2. eBay Motors (node_id: ebay-motors)
3. Collectibles & Trading (node_id: collectibles-trading)
4. Fashion / Luxury (node_id: fashion-luxury)
5. Refurbished & Open Box (node_id: refurbished-open-box)
6. Electronics & Technology (node_id: electronics-technology)
7. Home & Garden (node_id: home-garden)
8. Business & Industrial (node_id: business-industrial)
9. Everything Else / Cross-Category (node_id: everything-else)
10. Platform-Wide Trust & Safety (node_id: trust-safety)
11. eBay Advertising (node_id: ebay-advertising)
12. eBay Shipping & Logistics (node_id: shipping-logistics)
13. Seller Tools & Hub (node_id: seller-tools-hub)
14. Payments & Checkout (node_id: payments-checkout)
15. Live Commerce (node_id: live-commerce)
16. Discovery & Buyer Experience (node_id: discovery-buyer-experience)
17. Community & Education (node_id: community-education)
18. Events & Campaigns (node_id: events-campaigns)
19. Developer Platform (node_id: developer-platform)
20. Advertising (node_id: advertising)
21. Analytics (node_id: analytics)
22. Auction (node_id: auction)
23. Authentication (node_id: authentication)
24. Browse (node_id: browse)
25. Bulk Tools (node_id: bulk-tools)
26. Buyer (node_id: buyer)
27. Buyer Programs (node_id: buyer-programs)
28. Category (node_id: category)
29. Charity (node_id: charity)
30. Collectibles (node_id: collectibles)
31. Communication (node_id: communication)
32. Community (node_id: community)
33. Customer Service (node_id: customer-service)
34. Developer (node_id: developer)
35. Discovery (node_id: discovery)
36. Education (node_id: education)
37. Feedback (node_id: feedback)
38. Impact (node_id: impact)
39. International (node_id: international)
40. Inventory (node_id: inventory)
41. Listing (node_id: listing)
42. Listing Features (node_id: listing-features)
43. Listing Formats (node_id: listing-formats)
44. Listing Policies (node_id: listing-policies)
45. Listing Tools (node_id: listing-tools)
46. Live (node_id: live)
47. Marketing (node_id: marketing)
48. Notifications (node_id: notifications)
49. Order Management (node_id: order-management)
50. Payment (node_id: payment)

**For each program:**
1. Search for official eBay page (help.ebay.com, pages.ebay.com, www.ebay.com/sellercenter)
2. If not found, search investor relations (ebayinc.com, investors.ebayinc.com)
3. If still not found, skip it (only include programs with official sources)

**Output JSON array format:**
[
  {
    "canonical_name": "Program Name",
    "node_id": "exact-node-id-from-list-above",
    "url": "https://...",
    "title": "Page Title",
    "source_type": "ebay_official|press_release|secondary_source",
    "year": 2020,
    "notes": "Brief description"
  }
]

**Important:**
- Use exact node_id from the list above
- Skip programs where no official source can be found
- Prioritize ebay_official sources
- Include year if found

Save results to: batch-results/batch-1-results.json
